subcodes.first_line: O luminous lamp! The greatest of all lamps is the electric light, and yet it illumineth but a limited space [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها السراج النورانی اعظم السرج السراج الکهرباای مع ذلک لایضی ء الا مسافه
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @material and spiritual existence; two books, @light and darkness, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
